title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.420 - Additional appropriations for federal payments authorized
text:
105.420.  Additional appropriations for federal payments authorized. — There are hereby authorized to be appropriated to the trustee such sums as are found to be necessary in order to make the payments to the federal agency which the state is obligated to make.
(L. 1951 p. 788 § 6, A.L. 1959 S.B. 186, A.L. 1980 H.B. 1153, A.L. 2018 S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision)
